scripts.label: node --experimental-strip-types src/scripts/label.ts
scripts.bench:all: EVAL_RUN_ID=$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H-%M-%S) && export EVAL_RUN_ID && node --experimental-strip-types src/bench/classify.bench.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/bench/embed.bench.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/bench/rank.bench.ts && echo "Run ID: $EVAL_RUN_ID"
scripts.bench+report: EVAL_RUN_ID=$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H-%M-%S) && export EVAL_RUN_ID && node --experimental-strip-types src/bench/classify.bench.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/bench/embed.bench.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/bench/rank.bench.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/scripts/report.ts $EVAL_RUN_ID
